prompt: I want to build a semantic search app for my product catalog
rationale: Explicit semantic search + search app intent

prompt: How do I set up hybrid search combining BM25 and vector embeddings?
I have a PDF collection and want to make it searchable
Show me the top 10 errors in my application logs from the last hour
rationale: Log error analysis with time window

prompt: I want to write a PPL query to find anomalies in my Fluent Bit logs
rationale: PPL + Fluent Bit are log-analytics keywords

prompt: What's the error rate for my payment service over the past 24 hours?
rationale: Error rate analysis is a log-analytics use case

prompt: Find all slow spans in my distributed traces for traceId abc123
I need to investigate why my OpenTelemetry spans are showing high latency
How do I reconstruct the full trace tree for a given spanId?
rationale: Trace tree reconstruction is a trace-analytics workflow

prompt: Deploy my search app to Amazon OpenSearch Service
I want to provision an OpenSearch Serverless collection on AWS
How do I configure IAM roles and SigV4 auth for my OpenSearch domain?
I want to ingest my documents into AOSS via an OSIS pipeline from S3
rationale: Explicit OSIS + S3 + AOSS ingestion intent

prompt: Set up a managed ingestion pipeline to process PDFs from my S3 bucket into OpenSearch Serverless
rationale: Managed ingestion + S3 + AOSS pipeline setup

prompt: How do I use document_extractor with OSIS to ingest documents at scale?
I have JSONL chunks ready and want to ingest them into my AOS domain using an OSIS pipeline with semantic enrichment
I need to process my PDF documents into chunks using Docling before ingesting them
rationale: Document processing (Docling) routes to the ingest/document-processing skill

prompt: Bulk index my product catalog JSON into OpenSearch using the _bulk API
rationale: Structured bulk-indexing is NOT managed-ingestion-service — it's opensearch-launchpad
